The interesting thing is in Cramer's service he is doing excellent 
For example no where on  X is it mentioned he's up > 15% ABT in about 2 months and sold 20% of those position at the high yesterday (or the day before)

He actively takes profits trims reenter lower etc

He actually knows what he's doing

comment.body: Hi Alma, I'm new to trading, and have some confusions after spending time study the past posts. For intraday, the lvls and vanna flips are often close to each other, I learned that Vanna Flip can be use as a natural barrier, how do we use these lvls plus the vanna flips? and the maine pivot lvl( I suppose they are charm level), looks like they serve as a resistance as well. But I can't really see from the price action that the price is decreasing faster because of positive charm and increasing slower because of negative charm.
